client_id.description: Primetric OAuth2 client-credentials client ID. Used only for the token exchange; never logged.

client_secret.description: Primetric OAuth2 client-credentials client secret. Used only for the token exchange; never logged.

base_url.description: Primetric API base URL override for tests or proxies.

token_url.description: OAuth2 token endpoint override; defaults to Primetric's production token URL (legacy derives this independently of base_url, so this default is a fixed literal matching legacy's own defaultTokenURL constant).
